series_metadata.series_description: Includes tax compliance verification records for both job applicants and Ohio governmental employees/contractors. For job applicants (for the Department or any other requesting Ohio governmental agency) submission of applicants Limited Tax Waiver form, prospective governmental employers request for review, spreadsheet documenting review process, and communications regarding results of review, all retained together. For employees: spreadsheet workpapers and reports electronically generated via the personal income and school district tax processing system and reviewed by Internal Audit to identify potential instances of employee non-compliance with Ohio personal and school district income tax obligations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: audited by Auditor of State or 2 calendar years from creation. ; Paper: audited by Auditor of State or 2 calendar years from creation
